nasb.text: When they sought to seize Him, they feared the people, because they considered Him to be a prophet.

esv.text: And although they were seeking to arrest him, they feared the crowds, because they held him to be a prophet.

cnv.text: 他們想要逮捕他，但又怕群眾，因為他們都認為耶穌是先知。

ccb.text: 他们试图逮捕耶稣，但又害怕百姓，因为百姓都认为耶稣是先知。

csbs.text: 就想拘捕他，可是怕民众，因为他们都认为耶稣是先知。
